name: ResultRow
description: Provides the results of a query that retrieved the data for a standard metric that applies to an application, campaign, or journey.

allOf.description: An array of objects that defines the field and field values that were used to group data in a result set that contains multiple results. This value is null if the data in a result set isn’t grouped.
An array of objects that provides pre-aggregated values for a standard metric that applies to an application, campaign, or journey.
